visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in an indoor office setting. A woman with her hair in a bun and wearing a black blazer is sitting at a wooden desk with a laptop, laughing heartily. Behind her are office shelves, some boxes, and a variety of colorful objects. (2) A medium shot introduces a second woman, identified by on-screen text as KIKI, wearing a black t-shirt and glasses. She walks through an office hallway with cubicles and workstations visible. (3) KIKI stands in front of a white wall, looking towards the camera and speaking with exaggerated facial expressions. (4) The camera follows KIKI as she moves to another workstation. She crouches down near a computer tower on the floor and plugs in a small USB device. A woman in the background is seen working at her desk. (5) KIKI stands back up and reveals a white and blue mechanical keyboard. She holds it up, gesturing towards it while speaking excitedly. (6) A scene cut shows a man, later identified as Baozi, in a pantry or kitchen area. He wears a beige t-shirt and dark shorts, standing near a counter with snacks. (7) Back in the office, KIKI sits at her desk, which is cluttered with papers and a keyboard. She begins typing on her wireless mechanical keyboard while looking at a screen out of view. (8) A screen capture shows a messaging interface with green text bubbles appearing. (9) The man, Baozi, returns to his desk carrying a bowl of food. He looks confused as he stares at his monitor. He then looks around and eventually towards KIKI. (10) KIKI and other colleagues are seen laughing. (11) The first woman from the intro is seen on the phone, smiling and talking. (12) The final shot shows KIKI typing again with an overlay of a man's face and Starbucks bags.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 前情提要. [Slogan]: 大家叫包子趕快休息吃飯. (2) [Variety]: ↓調皮同事代表↓. [Logo]: KIKI. (3) [Variety]: 今天要幹嘛. (4) [Variety]: 要惡整同事啊. (5) [Variety]: 噓. (6) [Variety]: 我要讓他電腦有. [Logo]: 👻. (7) [Variety]: 插了這個會怎樣. (8) [Variety]: 這個是我的鍵盤. (9) [Variety]: 我的無線鍵盤. (10) [Variety]: 我要操控. (11) [Slogan]: 我要操控他的電腦. (12) [Variety]: 嘿嘿嘿. (13) [Variety]: 你要轉過去. (14) [Variety]: 等下他會發現你在用他的鍵盤. (15) [Variety]: 正在準備午餐的包子. (16) [Variety]: 我先打好. (17) [Subtitle]: 今天我請大家喝星巴克喔. (18) [Variety]: 有有有有有. (19) [Logo]: KIKI. (20) [Variety]: 幹嘛. (21) [Variety]: 為什麼又插回來了. (22) [Variety]: 謎之行為🤣. (23) [Variety]: 他說包子要請客. (24) [Variety]: 他要特大杯. (25) [Slogan]: 謝謝包子.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator (KIKI), 1 male victim (Baozi), 1 female colleague (first woman), and at least 3 other colleagues in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: KIKI: Female with red-tinted hair tied back, wearing glasses and a black t-shirt. Baozi: Male with short black hair, wearing a beige t-shirt and black shorts. First woman: Female with black hair in a bun, wearing a black blazer.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical modern office with open-plan desks, computer monitors, swivel chairs, cardboard boxes, and various personal items. A small pantry area with a counter and snacks is also seen.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with loud, genuine female laughter over a light, upbeat, and bouncy comedic background music. The laughter is high-pitched and contagious. (2) A clear female voice (KIKI) introduces the prank with an excited and mischievous tone. The background music continues at a steady 124 BPM. (3) The rhythmic sound of mechanical keyboard keys being pressed becomes prominent as KIKI explains her plan to use her wireless keyboard on a colleague's computer. (4) Short, playful cartoon sound effects punctuate the dialogue, emphasizing KIKI's movements as she sneaks around the office. (5) A different male voice is briefly heard in the distance as Baozi prepares his food. (6) Rapid, percussive keyboard typing sounds are heard as KIKI executes the prank, followed by a bright 'ding' sound effect. (7) The male speaker (Baozi) is heard expressing confusion and asking 'What?' in a surprised, slightly rising intonation. (8) Collective office chatter and multiple people laughing together create a joyful and high-arousal atmosphere. (9) A female voice is heard on a simulated phone call, ordering coffee with a professional yet friendly tone. The video ends with a final musical flourish and more laughter.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Introduction -> Conflict/Setup -> Execution -> Climax/Reaction -> Resolution
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain viewers with a humorous and relatable office prank where a colleague uses a technical trick to make it seem like another coworker is treating everyone to coffee.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While Starbucks is mentioned and shown, it serves as a plot device for the prank rather than a formal endorsement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A well-edited short video utilizing variety-show style text and sound effects to enhance the comedic timing of an office prank.
